topics.title: History and Evolution of Computer Networks: ARPANET to 5G
OSI Seven-Layer Model: Detailed Functions and Service Primitives

Physical Layer: Signals, Bandwidth, Nyquist Theorem, and Shannon's Capacity
Transmission Media: Guided (Copper, Fiber) and Unguided (Wireless)
Digital Encoding and Modulation: NRZ, Manchester, QAM, and OFDM
Error Detection and Correction: CRC, Hamming Codes, and Reed-Solomon
Framing Protocols: Byte Stuffing, Bit Stuffing, and HDLC
Multiple Access Protocols: TDMA, FDMA, CDMA, and Contention-Based
CSMA/CD and CSMA/CA: Collision Detection and Avoidance
Ethernet Standards: 10/100/1G/10G Ethernet and Frame Format
Switches and Bridges: MAC Learning, Forwarding Tables, and STP
VLANs and Trunking: 802.1Q Tagging and Inter-VLAN Routing
IP Addressing and Subnetting: CIDR, VLSM, and Supernetting
IPv6: Address Space, Header Format, Transition Mechanisms, and NDP
ARP and RARP: Address Resolution and Reverse Address Resolution
ICMP: Error Reporting, Ping, and Traceroute Implementation
Intra-Domain Routing: RIP (Distance Vector) and OSPF (Link State)
BGP: Internet's Inter-Domain Routing Protocol and Policy Routing
NAT and PAT: Network Address Translation, Port Forwarding, and Traversal
IP Multicasting: IGMP, PIM, and Multicast Routing Trees
TCP Protocol Deep Dive: Connection Setup, Teardown, and State Machine
TCP Flow and Congestion Control: Slow Start, CUBIC, and BBR
UDP and Real-Time Protocols: RTP, RTCP, and WebRTC
Socket Programming: TCP/UDP Sockets, Non-Blocking I/O, and epoll
QUIC and HTTP/3: Modern Transport Protocol Design
DNS: Hierarchical Resolution, Caching, Resource Records, and DNSSEC
HTTP/1.1 to HTTP/2: Request-Response, Caching, and Multiplexing
Email Protocols: SMTP, POP3, IMAP, and MIME Encoding
FTP, SSH, and Telnet: File Transfer and Secure Remote Access
Content Delivery Networks: Anycast, Edge Caching, and Load Balancing
DHCP: Dynamic Host Configuration, DORA Process, and Options
SSL/TLS: Handshake Protocol, Certificate Chains, and PKI
Firewalls, IDS, and IPS: Packet Filtering, Deep Inspection, and Snort
VPN Technologies: IPSec, L2TP, OpenVPN, and WireGuard
IEEE 802.11 Wi-Fi: MAC Protocol, CSMA/CA, and 802.11ax (Wi-Fi 6)
Cellular Networks: LTE/4G Architecture and 5G NR Technologies
Software-Defined Networking: OpenFlow, Control Plane Separation, and NFV
Overlay Networks and P2P: DHT, Chord, BitTorrent, and Kademlia
Quality of Service: DiffServ, IntServ, Traffic Shaping, and RSVP
Network Measurement and Monitoring: Wireshark, NetFlow, and SNMP
Placement Guide: Computer Networks Interview Questions and Career Paths
